snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Explicit Apple speech language-asset install exact-candidate review
reviewers.independence: Development and UI Design froze and independently accepted the exact 25-path candidate after service, helper, package, distribution and real macOS UI evidence. Planning changed only existing owner, dependency, privacy, acceptance, semantic and review artifacts.

dimensions.summary: Owners locate the explicit exact-language Apple install request, sender-bound progress lifecycle, native helper/package boundary and separate Start action without mixing onboarding or other Planning work.
PRD, API, architecture, I18N, security, privacy, dependency, quality and release owners agree that availability/start never download and only explicit install may invoke Apple system ownership.
PIGE-CAP-003/E2.04 planned targets distinguish protocol/UI evidence from an unexecuted real system install; semantic lock v3/1,228 preserves every Requirement, Exit and Phase status.
The exact candidate has focused 8/145, independent 7/138, full 119 passed/1 skipped files and 1,384 passed/1 skipped tests, typecheck/build/helper/integrity and arm64 package/distribution evidence.
No document or status is added; the Apple Speech platform API is registered once and existing owners hold the API, network, privacy and evidence deltas.

verification.evidence: The exact combined candidate passes docs, decisions, UI visual, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

Focus 8/145, independent 7/138, full 119 passed/1 skipped files and 1,384 passed/1 skipped tests, typecheck/build/native helper/integrity and macOS arm64 package plus downloaded-distribution smoke pass; exact ff9106b5/ee4c2473 identities are independently accepted.

verification.command: npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The approved assets-unavailable UI exposes one explicit install action without starting it; semantic lock v3/1,228 and CON-001 through CON-004 pass with every status unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass within the fixed entry, trace and governed Markdown budgets.

coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds one explicit Apple-managed exact-language install request and body-free sender event stream without implicit download, public cancel, Job, Broker, Skill, model, vault, persistence or recording authority.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development/UI Design froze exact ff9106b5/ee4c2473 bytes after independent review. Planning bound only existing owner, dependency, privacy, acceptance, semantic and review paths without changing the 25 paths.

nonBlockingRisks: PIGE-CAP-003/E2.04 remain planned until publication/full exit acceptance; candidate evidence does not promote a Requirement, Exit or Phase.
The exact real macOS UI proves the enabled install action but deliberately does not execute Apple-owned non-cancelable download; real installation remains open evidence.
Persisted dictation-language selection remains open; availability/start never install assets implicitly and installed never auto-records.
macOS x64, Windows/Linux speech, Developer ID, hardened runtime, entitlements, notarization/staple and public trust remain unclaimed.
The separate Welcome/system-locale/Models/Vault onboarding request is excluded.
